scripts.bootstrap: npm run setup:env && npm run doctor
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.qa:pipeline: npm run qa:batch && npm run qa:quick
scripts.qa:quick: npm run ci && npm run migrations:list && npm run health
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci && docker build -t yrc-api:ci .
